description_en: Hong Kong may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 23 halal restaurants and 6 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Hong Kong, China, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Hong Kong: 42 halal restaurants listed, 6 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.6/5.
